title: Trim ask.ts to under 100 lines
description: ask.ts is currently 115 lines. The vision mandates < 100 lines as an integration layer. Reduce by: (1) Remove the Accumulators interface — inline the type directly into handleToolCall's parameter, (2) Remove unnecessary blank lines, (3) Keep all functionality intact. Target: ≤ 99 lines. Acceptance: wc -l src/ask.ts reports ≤ 99, all 174 tests still pass.
